name: Ensure EC2 Instances are deployed in a VPC
body:
### Security intent

This control reduces unnecessary exposure by ensuring that **eC2 Instances are deployed in a VPC**.

### Network condition reviewed

The assessment reviews eC2 Instances are deployed in a VPC in AWS. It focuses on rules, endpoints, listeners, or policies that make the service reachable in a riskier way than intended.

### Expected posture

Public reachability should be deliberate, documented, and tightly scoped. Administrative and data-plane paths should use private connectivity, strong TLS, explicit source ranges, and provider-native controls rather than broad internet access.
description: EC2 Instances are deployed in a VPC
remediationDescription:
## AWS remediation

Instances should run in VPC-based networking.

### Console
1. Create/select VPC and subnets.
2. Launch replacement instances in VPC.
3. Cut over traffic and retire legacy configuration.

### AWS CLI
~~~bash
aws ec2 run-instances \
  --image-id <ami-id> \
  --instance-type <instance-type> \
  --subnet-id <subnet-id> \
  --security-group-ids <sg-id>
~~~

### References
- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/vpc-migrate.html
- https://docs.aws.amazon.com/cli/latest/reference/ec2/run-instances.html
